title: Discovery conversations with Orca Network (Garrett & Berta)
description: The community-uptake direction rests on a partner we don't yet understand — next move is discovery, not engineering. Interview questions: docs/strategy/orca-network-discovery-questions.md (curation workflow & pain; would they value/advocate a map-first tool; Acartia data-flow granularity; does the research-impact story land; what would make them say no).

title: Community uptake via Orca Network partnership
description: Path to first-party submissions: partnership with Orca Network, targeting the shore-regular persona. The wedge is doing their FB sighting-coordination function properly (map-first, structured, trajectory-aware). Lead with the partnership, not scraping. See docs/decisions/007-community-uptake-strategy.md and docs/strategy/community-uptake.md.

title: Human review of rights-policy advisories
description: Three advisories from the v1.2 policy gate verification remain human_needed (Sections 1-2 completeness, Section 4 conferral framing, Section 3 gap coverage). All auto checks green. Policy now lives at docs/rights-policy.md.

title: Emit coordinateUncertaintyInMeters in DwC-A export
description: GBIF validator flagged absence (2026-06-19). Needs a per-channel source-of-uncertainty decision; touches scripts/dwca/fields.ts ordering, which ripples to meta.xml and GeoParquet. Policy: emit when known, omit when NULL, never 0 (docs/rights-policy.md).

title: Enrich eml.xml resource contacts and re-check GBIF validator
description: GBIF RESOURCE_CONTACTS_MISSING_OR_INCOMPLETE (2026-06-19). v1.3 Phase 13 added a resource contact — re-validate to confirm the warning cleared.

title: Ingest in-region Orca sightings from GBIF
description: Pull Salish Sea cetacean records already in GBIF from datasets we don't otherwise ingest; surface in-region ones. Mirror-image of SRC-01 (docs/decisions/005): must dedupe against provider + source_url to avoid re-importing our own contributed records. Was GSD backlog phase 999.2.

title: Surface sightings from Facebook community groups
description: Cold-start / lock-in mitigation. Partnership-first per decision 007 — scraping is the fallback, not the lead. Scope depends on discovery outcome.

title: Make the sighter's contribution visible
description: Thin UI over the existing v1.2/v1.3 pipeline giving a sighter immediate proof their observation counts (lands in the record, feeds Acartia→WRAS and nightly DwC-A→GBIF). Open: unit of reward (per-sighting confirmation / running count / personal map layer), tie to auth identity, how loud. Partially seeded by sidebar pitch (commit f014316). Sequence after map is populated and Orca Network direction confirmed.

title: Contextual data enriching a sighting
description: Sighter sees nearby historical sightings, salmon run data, tides, individual whale biographical info alongside their sighting.

title: Link to external cetacean resources
description: Platform links out to existing external cetacean resources and databases.

title: Emit organismID and register archive with GBIF/OBIS
description: Occurrence records carry individual-animal identity (organismID); register the DwC-A with GBIF/OBIS. Note: unvalidated whale IDs (e.g. T065S) are never emitted as organismID per docs/rights-policy.md — only validated identities qualify.

title: Catalog of individual Salish Sea cetaceans
description: Platform hosts a comprehensive catalog of individual cetaceans (all species). HappyWhale tracks 693 individuals — organismID territory, distinct from contributors (INDIV-01).

title: App UI: organization/collection browse pages
description: Frontend surfaces for the v1.3 provenance graph — deferred from v1.3 by design (backend-only milestone).

title: Direct partner ingest: OrcaSound / HappyWhale
description: Slot new partners into the collections model (org row + collection row + ingest writer setting collection_id); no schema change per partner. Fresh question per partner: do they forward observer names / stable IDs for recordedByID? Trigger: partner confirms API access, or product wants to retire Maplify.

title: Cross-provider contributor unification (contributor_links)
description: jmaughn (iNat) ≈ James Maughn (native) is probable, not confirmed. Extension point is a contributor_links table — never a shared FK on name similarity (docs/decisions/006).

title: URL → whole-occurrence importer (source_url Layer 2)
description: Given a source_url, fetch and map a whole occurrence (species/date/location/photos/observer), not just resolve its channel. One fetcher per provider domain; reuse the URL registry; dedupe on source_url; respect SRC-01. Trigger: appetite for a new inbound ingest path.

title: Populate contributor ORCIDs for 28 native contributors
description: contributors.orcid column and recordedByID emit shipped in v1.3; manual curation of the 28 native contributors remains.
